message:
feat(session): enhance get() with composite PK and FOR UPDATE (bd-31l)

Add enhanced get() methods to Session:

- GetOptions struct with with_for_update, skip_locked, nowait options
- get_by_pk() for composite primary key lookups
- get_with_options() for full-featured lookups with locking

Features:
- Composite PK support via &[Value] slice
- SELECT ... FOR UPDATE row locking
- SKIP LOCKED and NOWAIT variants
- Proper WHERE clause generation for multi-column PKs

This unblocks:
- bd-2q3: Implement lazy loading for relationships

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
